title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Kalshi seeks funding at $40B valuation, nearly doubling last raise: FT
summary: Kalshi is reportedly in talks to raise new capital at a $40 billion valuation, reflecting growing investor confidence in regulated prediction markets.

title: Aave Token Could Climb 50x by End of 2030, Standard Chartered Says—Here's Why
summary: Bitcoin to $500K, Ethereum to $40K, and Aave to $3,500 by the end of 2030? Standard Chartered just laid out some bullish price targets.

title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
summary: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
summary: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

title: Leaked Code Suggests Anthropic Is Preparing to Bring Fable 5 Back
summary: A leaker found new strings inside Claude Code that hint at weekly Fable 5 usage built into subscription plans, not sold separately as before.

title: OpenAI Turns Up the Heat With Jalapeño, Its First Custom AI Chip
summary: Built with Broadcom, the LLM-focused accelerator is the first step in OpenAI's effort to design the hardware behind ChatGPT and beyond.

title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
summary: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

title: Morning Minute: Meta Is Building a Prediction Market
summary: Arthur Hayes put out a bull case for the CARDS token, and the Clarity Act is facing some surprising opposition from a new group.

summary:

summary:
